title: Rennes, Brittany — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Rennes is a city in Brittany with a population of 218,000. The capital of Brittany with a well-preserved medieval center, a major tech hub, and a lively student population.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
